mapper.select: select meeting_id, title, type, description, project_id, iteration_id, start_time, end_time, creator_id, status, create_at, update_at from meeting where meeting_id = #{meetingId}
mapper.insert: insert into meeting (title, type, description, project_id, iteration_id, start_time, end_time, creator_id, status, create_at) values (#{title}, #{type}, #{description}, #{projectId}, #{iterationId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{creatorId}, #{status}, #{createAt})
